# Generated by tools/m10_third_century.py --write; AD 200-299 disasters.

# Crisis of the Third Century; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; OUP-CRISIS
antq_m10_third_third_century_crisis = {
	monthly_spawn_chance = monthly_spawn_chance_unique
	can_start = {
		tag = XAA
		current_date >= 235.1.1
		current_date < 285.1.1
		has_any_active_disaster = no
	}
	can_end = {
		current_date >= 285.1.1
	}
	on_start = {
		trigger_event_non_silently = antq_m10_third.3005
	}
}
